arts.ttl: Exclusive: Liverpool, Arsenal & Man Utd keen on potential €60m transfer of 11 G/A midfielder
arts.sum: Liverpool, Arsenal and Manchester United are among the clubs showing an interest in the potential transfer of Nottingham Forest midfielder Morgan Gibbs-White. The England international has been in fine form for Forest this season, contributing a total of five goals and six assists from the middle of the park in 24 Premier League games. arts.ttl: Chelsea RIP OFF Man Utd: Sancho revelation changes EVERYTHING
arts.sum: Despite boasting a purchase obligation as part of their loan deal, Chelsea may not be obliged to sign Jadon Sancho after all, according to a report. Chelsea signed Sancho on an initial loan deal but with the obligation to make the move permanent if they finish above 15th in the Premier.
